Record Class EmailAddress

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.google.common.labs.email.EmailAddress
public record EmailAddress(Optional<String> displayName, String localPart, String domain) extends Record
Represents an email address according to RFC 5322.

For example: 


 EmailAddress emailAddress = EmailAddress.parse("john-doe@gmail.com");
Since:
9.9.4

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    EmailAddress(Optional<String> displayName, String localPart, String domain)
    Creates an instance of a EmailAddress record class.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    address()
    Returns the addr-spec, in the form of user@mycompany.com.
    Optional<String>
    displayName()
    Returns the value of the displayName record component.
    String
    domain()
    Returns the value of the domain record component.
    final boolean
    equals(Object o)
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    String

    Returns the value of the localPart record component.
    static EmailAddress
    of(String localPart, String domain)
    For example: EmailAddress.of("user", "mycompany.com").
    static EmailAddress
    parse(String address)
    Parses address and throws Parser.ParseException if failed.
    static Parser<EmailAddress>
    parser()
    Returns a parser for email address, according to RFC 5322, supporting BMP characters.
    String
    toString()
    Returns the full email address, in the form of local-part@domain or "display name"<local-part@domain>.
    EmailAddress
    withDisplayName(String displayName)
    Returns an otherwise equivalent EmailAddress but with displayName.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

  • Constructor Details

    • EmailAddress

      public EmailAddress(Optional<String> displayName, String localPart, String domain)
      Creates an instance of a EmailAddress record class.
      Parameters:
      displayName - the value for the displayName record component
      localPart - the value for the localPart record component
      domain - the value for the domain record component

  • Method Details

    • withDisplayName

      public EmailAddress withDisplayName(String displayName)
      Returns an otherwise equivalent EmailAddress but with displayName.

    • of

      public static EmailAddress of(String localPart, String domain)
      For example: EmailAddress.of("user", "mycompany.com").

    • address

      public String address()
      Returns the addr-spec, in the form of user@mycompany.com.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the full email address, in the form of local-part@domain or "display name"<local-part@domain>. Backslashes and double quotes in the display name are auto-escaped.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record

    • parse

      public static EmailAddress parse(String address)
      Parses address and throws Parser.ParseException if failed.

    • parser

      public static Parser<EmailAddress> parser()
      Returns a parser for email address, according to RFC 5322, supporting BMP characters.

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • displayName

      public Optional<String> displayName()
      Returns the value of the displayName record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the displayName record component

    • localPart

      public String localPart()
      Returns the value of the localPart record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the localPart record component

    • domain

      public String domain()
      Returns the value of the domain record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the domain record component
